comment: Block Bash commands that match a denylist of dangerous patterns: rm -rf on root or home, force-push to protected branches, dropping databases, deleting Azure resource groups, kubectl deletes against production. Exits non-zero to prevent the tool call from proceeding. Fails CLOSED if python3 is missing or CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT cannot be parsed — a security hook that fails silently is worse than no hook. Install by merging the 'hooks.PreToolUse' array into ~/.claude/settings.json.

hooks.comment: Inspect the Bash command; block if it matches any pattern in the denylist. Patterns are deliberately conservative — they assume a real intent to destroy when matched and prefer false-positive (block requires user confirmation) over false-negative (let it through and lose data). Parses CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT with python3 (universally available) rather than jq.
hooks.command: command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'block-dangerous-commands hook: python3 not found; failing closed' >&2; exit 2; }; cmd=$(printf '%s' "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c 'import sys,json;d=json.load(sys.stdin);print(d.get("command",""))' 2>/dev/null) || { echo 'block-dangerous-commands hook: failed to parse CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT; failing closed' >&2; exit 2; }; [ -n "$cmd" ] || { echo 'block-dangerous-commands hook: empty .command; failing closed' >&2; exit 2; }; deny() { echo "BLOCKED by block-dangerous-commands hook: $1" >&2; echo "Command: $cmd" >&2; echo "If this is intentional, run the command outside Claude Code or update the hook denylist." >&2; exit 2; }; case "$cmd" in *'rm -rf /'*|*'rm -rf /*'*|*'rm -rf ~'*|*'rm -rf $HOME'*|*'rm -rf $HOME/'*) deny 'rm -rf against / or $HOME — too broad to permit unattended';; *'rm -rf .'*|*'rm -rf ..'*|*'rm -rf ../*'*) deny 'rm -rf against . or .. — pwd-relative wipe is dangerous; specify the target explicitly';; *'git push --force '*|*'git push -f '*|*'git push --force-with-lease '*) case "$cmd" in *' main'*|*' main '*|*' master'*|*' master '*|*' release'*|*' production'*) deny 'force-push to protected branch (main/master/release/production)';; esac;; *'git reset --hard origin/main'*|*'git reset --hard origin/master'*) deny 'hard reset against origin protected branch — could lose local work';; *'DROP DATABASE '*|*'DROP SCHEMA '*) deny 'destructive SQL on database/schema — confirm out-of-band';; *'TRUNCATE TABLE '*) deny 'TRUNCATE — confirm intent; data loss is immediate and uncommitted';; *'az group delete '*|*'az group delete-recursive '*) case "$cmd" in *'--name rg-'*prod*|*'-n rg-'*prod*) deny 'az group delete on a production resource group';; esac;; *'kubectl delete '*) case "$cmd" in *'--context'*prod*|*'-n '*prod*|*'--namespace'*prod*) deny 'kubectl delete against production context/namespace';; esac;; *'az containerapp delete '*) case "$cmd" in *'rg-'*prod*) deny 'Container Apps delete in a production resource group';; esac;; *'docker system prune'*) case "$cmd" in *' -a '*|*' --all '*|*' --volumes '*) deny 'docker prune with -a or --volumes — wipes images and volumes';; esac;; *'curl '*'| sudo '*|*'curl '*'| bash'*|*'wget '*'| bash'*|*'wget '*'| sh'*) deny 'piping curl/wget into a shell — inspect the script first, then run intentionally';; *':(){ :|:& };:'*) deny 'fork bomb pattern detected';; esac; exit 0
